_comment: SOT for RBAC regression (docs/agent-rules/rbac-golden-and-cross-cutting-regression.md). Independent declaration of INTENDED access — NOT derived from default-bootstrap.json — so it catches bootstrap misconfig. Both the backend enforcement IT (A layer) and the Playwright per-role golden (B layer) read this one file. A drift check asserts every referenced role/permission code exists in the system.

platform-baseline._comment: default profile: only platform roles exist. operator/viewer retired 2026-07-03 (OSS #1167).

cross-tenant.assert: a member of tenant A must not resolve or read tenant B's roles/rows
